content:
1. Validates+prices an order (stock, per-item discounts), persists it+stock deltas, emails confirmation. Exists as the core e-commerce order pipeline.
2. All side-effects (DB writes, email) lack a transaction or try/finally; partial failure leaves inconsistent state. Also watch KeyError on required config keys and SMTP exceptions after order is already saved.
3. Unknown — would need to ask the author.
4. No stock race protection, email failure after commit, missing customer email, non-atomic multi-item updates, config KeyErrors, timezone-naive expiry checks.
